holdings.infoBox: HIS is an equity ETF with a total of 48 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 6.49%, Alphabet at 6.33%, NVIDIA at 6.22%, Microsoft at 5.75%, and Amazon.com at 5.14%.

overview.description: The Humilis US Focused Opportunities ETF (HIS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. HISis actively managed, seeking long-term capital appreciation through exposure to US large-cap stocks believed to offer superior risk-reward opportunities. HIS was launched on May 18, 2026 and is issued by Humilis.

data.title: Humilis Investments' Brian Belski launches HIS, a new ETF
data.text: Brian Belski, founder, CEO and chief investment officer at Humilis Investment Strategies, joins CNBC's "Halftime Report" to detail the launch of HIS, a new ETF.
